page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: CMLT702 or ENGL702.

ENGL708 Seminar in Rhetoric (3 Credits)

Topics in rhetoric: history of rhetorical theory, modern rhetorical theory, rhetorical interpretation, composition theory, rhetoric of social groups. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.

ENGL709 Seminar in Transnational Literatures and Cultures (3 Credits) Examines cultural and political ideas as they circulate across nations in literary and/or other forms (film, song, visual culture, digital works, etc.) in both historical and modern-day contexts.

Cross-listed with: CMLT709.
